creator: freebsd@centromere.net
text:
This port does not build. Output follows:
centaurus# make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for libdvdread-4.1.3
=> MD5 Checksum OK for libdvdread-4.1.3.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for libdvdread-4.1.3.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for libdvdread-4.1.3
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for libdvdread-4.1.3
File to patch: 
No file found--skip this patch? [n] y
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to dvdread/ifo_types.h.rej
Can't create dvdread/ifo_types.h.rej, output is in /tmp//patchrNAa21N: No such file or directory
=> Patch patch-dvdread-ifo_types.h failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es) patch-Makefile patch-configure2 applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/libdvdread.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/multimedia/libdvdread
make
